creator: maho@FreeBSD.org
text:
According to 
http://blogs.sun.com/GullFOSS/entry/src680_is_dead_long_live
DEV300 branch is created for OpenOffice.org. This will be OpenOffice.org 3.0. 
Also it is clear from the tag's name.

2.x branch will be dead, but I don't know where it will go. The last
milestone is the SRC680_m248. The ports/editors/openoffice.org-2-devel
should stay here for while until SRC680 will actually dead. Of course
I'll mark this port as IGNORE.

jkim kindly asked me to do so, and he is right.

Fix: 

repocopy

ports/editors/openoffice.org-2-devel -> ports/editors/openoffice.org-3-devel
